geographic_restrictions: Philadelphia, Bucks, Chester, Delaware, and Montgomery counties in Pennsylvania
project_area: Business formation or development for creative entrepreneurs in fields such as marketing, architecture, visual arts, crafts, design, film and media, digital games, music, entertainment, publishing, or similar creative fields
demographic_requirements: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age, current residents of Pennsylvania for at least one year, and demonstrate gross revenue of less than $200,000 from the creative entrepreneur business. Non-profit organizations are not eligible.
eligibility_summary: Creative entrepreneurs (individuals or for-profit micro-businesses) operating in specified creative fields within Philadelphia, Bucks, Chester, Delaware, and Montgomery counties, with gross revenue under $200,000, who have not received funding in the past three years. Applicants must complete a referral meeting with a small business development organization and submit a final report with proof of fund usage.
